testimonial.title: Stories from our users
testimonial.t1Quote: I just wrote my idea after work, and the next morning a business plan was ready. After addressing the market risks the AI evaluation pointed out, I got great responses at investor meetings.
testimonial.t2Quote: I could prepare for fundraising without external consulting. The AI-generated SWOT analysis and growth strategy report was at actual consultant level. Uploading my business plan as PDF was really convenient.
testimonial.t3Quote: I found out about CASA 3 days before our university startup competition. Made business plan, pitch deck, and landing page all in one day and submitted. The result? Grand prize!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, all features are currently free. AI API costs are covered by the platform.
faq.q2: What's the difference between Pre-founder and Founder tracks?
faq.a2: The Pre-founder Track takes your idea and AI validates, evaluates, and generates documents. The Founder Track takes your existing business plan and AI reviews, diagnoses, strategizes, and creates reports. You can choose a track when creating a project.
faq.q3: Does it work for any type of idea or business?
faq.a3: Yes, you can input startup ideas and business plans from any field — IT, manufacturing, services, etc. The AI analyzes according to the relevant industry.
faq.q4: What's the quality of AI-generated documents?
faq.a4: Business plans comply with government support formats and are submission-ready. Reports provide consultant-level analysis. Users can review and edit at each stage to achieve desired quality.
faq.q5: Does AI make all decisions automatically?
faq.a5: No. CASA uses a 'Human-in-the-Loop' approach — AI creates drafts, and all important decisions are reviewed and approved by users. Revision and regeneration are available at every stage.
faq.q6: Can I upload a business plan PDF?
faq.a6: Yes, in the Founder Track you can upload PDF files and text is automatically extracted. Supports up to 10MB, and you can manually edit the extracted text.
faq.a7: Yes. Pre-founder Track supports PDF/Word download for business plans. Founder Track supports printing or Word (.doc) download for reports.
faq.q8: Is my idea and business data secure?
faq.a8: All data is encrypted with Row Level Security — only you can access it. Input data is never exposed externally or used as AI training data.
faq.q9: Can I use it in English?
faq.a9: Yes, Korean and English are supported. Switch in language settings, and AI generates documents in your selected language.
faq.q10: Can I use it with my team?
faq.a10: Currently in MVP, it operates on individual accounts. You can share results via share links or document downloads. Team collaboration features will be added in the future.
